Settings

Settings

App identity, export, integrations & backup

App Identity

K

This name and photo appears in the sidebar.

Display Preferences

Hide All Balances
Replace all monetary values with dots
Currency
Rp — Indonesian Rupiah

Export Data

Export Period
June 2026

Excel includes 7 sheets: Transactions, Accounts, Monthly Summary, Category Spending, Budgets, Goals, Debts. CSV exports transactions only.

Notion Integration

Export your transactions directly to a Notion database. You need a Notion integration and a database with these properties: Name (title), Date (date), Type (select), Amount (number), Category (select), Account (text), Notes (text).

Uses the same period selection from Export Data above. Tokens are stored locally on your machine only.

Backup & Restore

Your database is stored as a single file (data/finance.db). Export to create a backup copy.

About

Kanemori
Personal Finance Tracker v0.1.0

Local-first personal finance tracker. All data stored locally on your machine.
